traps.detail: a comment claims a daily 24h-JWT refresh keeps a merchant logged in forever
traps.correct: the 24h JWT and the ~90-day Fisconline credential are different lifetimes; refreshing the JWT does nothing for the 90-day expiry, which must be tracked and alerted before it lapses

expectations.expectation: The code treats the 24h JWT and the ~90-day Fisconline credential as different lifetimes. A daily/JWT refresh is NOT used as the answer to the 90-day expiry.

CredentialHealth tracks each taxpayer's ~90-day Fisconline credential age/expiry and surfaces an actionable signal (returns/flags at-risk taxpayers with lead time) BEFORE the credential lapses. It is not a no-op and is not wired to 'is the JWT fresh?'.
